requirement_topic.en: Dangerous Goods Transport — UN 38.3 and Shipping Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 危险品运输——UN 38.3与运输文件
requirement_topic.zht: 危險品運輸——UN 38.3與運輸文件

summary.en: Lithium cells and batteries are dangerous goods (UN 3480, UN 3481, UN 3090, UN 3091) and must pass the UN 38.3 test series in the UN Manual of Tests and Criteria before transport to Ecuador by sea or air. For ocean shipment to the principal seaport of Guayaquil the IMDG Code applies; for air freight the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (based on the ICAO Technical Instructions) apply, including state-of-charge limits and quantity/packaging rules. The shipment must carry a UN 38.3 test summary, correct UN packaging, lithium battery handling marks/labels, and a dangerous-goods declaration. These transport rules are international and apply on the China-to-Ecuador lane regardless of Ecuadorian domestic product certification; they are separate from, and additional to, the INEN Certificate of Conformity.
summary.zh: 锂电芯及电池属危险品（UN 3480、UN 3481、UN 3090、UN 3091），在经海运或空运至厄瓜多尔前，须通过《联合国试验和标准手册》中的UN 38.3系列试验。海运至主要海港瓜亚基尔适用IMDG规则；空运适用IATA危险品规则（基于ICAO技术细则），包括荷电状态限值及数量/包装规则。货物须随附UN 38.3试验摘要、正确的UN包装、锂电池操作标记/标签及危险品申报。这些运输规则属国际性，适用于中国至厄瓜多尔航线，与厄瓜多尔国内产品认证无关；它们独立于并附加于INEN合格证书之外。
summary.zht: 鋰電芯及電池屬危險品（UN 3480、UN 3481、UN 3090、UN 3091），在經海運或空運至厄瓜多爾前，須通過《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》中的UN 38.3系列試驗。海運至主要海港瓜亞基爾適用IMDG規則；空運適用IATA危險品規則（基於ICAO技術細則），包括荷電狀態限值及數量/包裝規則。貨物須隨附UN 38.3試驗摘要、正確的UN包裝、鋰電池操作標記/標籤及危險品申報。這些運輸規則屬國際性，適用於中國至厄瓜多爾航線，與厄瓜多爾國內產品認證無關；它們獨立於並附加於INEN合格證書之外。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport test series
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods) for sea freight to Guayaquil
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air freight

summary.en: China applies the same international transport framework for exported lithium batteries. UN 38.3 testing is required, and Chinese exporters must also obtain a transport appraisal/identification report (yunshu jianding) for dangerous goods and, for air transport, comply with CAAC requirements alongside IATA. Domestic carriage references the national standard GB 19521 series and air transport packaging standards. Because UN 38.3, IMDG and IATA are international instruments, the testing performed for Chinese export transport is generally the same basis recognized for the Ecuador lane, unlike product certification which does not carry over.
summary.zh: 中国对出口锂电池适用相同的国际运输框架。须进行UN 38.3测试，中国出口商还须取得危险品运输鉴定/鉴别报告（运输鉴定），空运还须在符合IATA的同时遵守CAAC要求。国内运输参考国家标准GB 19521系列及航空运输包装标准。由于UN 38.3、IMDG和IATA为国际文书，为中国出口运输所做的测试，其基础通常与厄瓜多尔航线所认可者相同——这与不能延用的产品认证不同。
summary.zht: 中國對出口鋰電池適用相同的國際運輸框架。須進行UN 38.3測試，中國出口商還須取得危險品運輸鑑定/鑑別報告（運輸鑑定），空運還須在符合IATA的同時遵守CAAC要求。國內運輸參考國家標準GB 19521系列及航空運輸包裝標準。由於UN 38.3、IMDG和IATA為國際文書，為中國出口運輸所做的測試，其基礎通常與厄瓜多爾航線所認可者相同——這與不能延用的產品認證不同。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — recognized internationally, applied for Chinese export transport
China dangerous-goods transport appraisal report (yunshu jianding) for export
GB 19521 series — lithium battery hazard classification; CAAC rules for air transport

gap.en: The transport gap is the smallest of the matrix because UN 38.3, IMDG and IATA are international and the underlying test work generally carries over to the Ecuador lane. Practical points: (1) the UN 38.3 test summary and dangerous-goods declaration must accompany every shipment and be available to the Ecuadorian importer and SENAE customs; (2) state-of-charge and packaging limits for air freight must be respected; (3) UN 38.3 satisfies transport safety only and does not substitute for the INEN Certificate of Conformity or ARCOTEL homologation, which remain separate obligations.
gap.zh: 运输差距是本矩阵中最小的，因为UN 38.3、IMDG和IATA属国际规则，基础测试工作通常可延用至厄瓜多尔航线。实务要点：（1）每批货物须随附UN 38.3试验摘要及危险品申报，并可供厄瓜多尔进口商及SENAE海关查验；（2）空运须遵守荷电状态及包装限值；（3）UN 38.3仅满足运输安全，不能替代INEN合格证书或ARCOTEL型号核准，后者仍为独立义务。
gap.zht: 運輸差距是本矩陣中最小的，因為UN 38.3、IMDG和IATA屬國際規則，基礎測試工作通常可延用至厄瓜多爾航線。實務要點：（1）每批貨物須隨附UN 38.3試驗摘要及危險品申報，並可供厄瓜多爾進口商及SENAE海關查驗；（2）空運須遵守荷電狀態及包裝限值；（3）UN 38.3僅滿足運輸安全，不能替代INEN合格證書或ARCOTEL型號核准，後者仍為獨立義務。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for transport — UN 38.3 plus IMDG (sea) or IATA/ICAO (air) compliance and documentation are required to ship lithium batteries to Ecuador; this is separate from in-country product certification
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for export transport — UN 38.3 and a dangerous-goods transport appraisal report are required for lithium battery export from China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport is the most portable part of the file: UN 38.3 with IMDG (sea to Guayaquil) or IATA/ICAO (air) applies on the China-to-Ecuador lane, and the test work done for Chinese export generally carries over. Exporters must keep the UN 38.3 summary, packaging marks and dangerous-goods declaration with every shipment, but should not treat UN 38.3 as evidence of product conformity — the INEN Certificate of Conformity and ARCOTEL homologation remain separate mandatory steps.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输是文件中最可通用的部分：UN 38.3配合IMDG（海运至瓜亚基尔）或IATA/ICAO（空运）适用于中国至厄瓜多尔航线，为中国出口所做的测试工作通常可延用。出口商须将UN 38.3摘要、包装标记及危险品申报随每批货物保存，但不应将UN 38.3视为产品符合性证据——INEN合格证书与ARCOTEL型号核准仍为独立的强制步骤。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸是文件中最可通用的部分：UN 38.3配合IMDG（海運至瓜亞基爾）或IATA/ICAO（空運）適用於中國至厄瓜多爾航線，為中國出口所做的測試工作通常可延用。出口商須將UN 38.3摘要、包裝標記及危險品申報隨每批貨物保存，但不應將UN 38.3視為產品符合性證據——INEN合格證書與ARCOTEL型號核准仍為獨立的強制步驟。

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)
